CustomField.formula: If(ISBLANK(Parent.Name),"No Parent Specified", IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name)), HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260)) + "/lightning/r/account/"+Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Id+"/view",Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name)), HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260)) + "/lightning/r/account/"+Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Id+"/view",Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name)), HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260)) + "/lightning/r/account/"+Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Id+"/view",Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name)), HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260)) + "/lightning/r/account/"+Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Id+"/view",Parent.Parent.Parent.Parent.Name), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Parent.Name)), HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260)) + "/lightning/r/account/"+Parent.Parent.Parent.Id+"/view",Parent.Parent.Parent.Name), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Parent.Name)),HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260)) + "/lightning/r/account/"+Parent.Parent.Id+"/view",Parent.Parent.Name), IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Parent.Name)),HYPERLINK(LEFT($Api.Partner_Server_URL_260, FIND( '/services', $Api.Partner_Server_URL_260)) + "/lightning/r/account/"+Parent.Id+"/view",Parent.Name), "Ultimate Parent Can't be Calculated"))))))))
CustomField.label: Ultimate Parent
